title: angelica urumiensis
intro: Angelica urumiensis, also known as Himalayan angelica or Chinese angelica, is a perennial plant native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Angelica urumiensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Angelica urumiensis are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
